Summarize posterior draws (mean + quantiles)

Source: R/02-utilities-internal.R
dot-posterior_summarize.Rd

Summarize posterior draws (mean + quantiles)

Usage

.posterior_summarize(
  draws,
  probs = c(0.025, 0.5, 0.975),
  interval = "credible"
)

Arguments

draws

Numeric vector, matrix, or array with draws in last dimension.

probs

Numeric quantile probs.

interval

Character or NULL; NULL for no interval, "credible" for equal-tailed quantile intervals (default), "hpd" for highest posterior density intervals.

Value

List with estimate, lower, upper, and q.

On this page
